name: Raised Pork Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pint Jellied stock (prepared using pork bones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Shape the mixture into a pie crust lined with parchment paper.
4. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Turn off heat and let cool before serving.
